text: Action: During a conflict, bow this stronghold. Choose a participating Monk character you control - that character cannot be chosen as the target of an opponent's event during this conflict. If you have played 5 or more cards in this conflict, also move 1 fate from a ring to this character.
name: High House of Light

text: Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 fate on each unclaimed ring.
flavorText: "The wheel without a hub, turning, stops for the hand of neither master or no master." - Togashi Kazue
name: Fuchi Mura

text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on [clan-dragon] clan cards.
name: Support of the Dragon

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel. The controller of the duel's winner may place 1 fate on an unclaimed ring.
flavorText: "Only a mind open to the world can perceive it." - Tao of Shinsei
name: Taoist Adept

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, return a ring in your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool - look at your opponent's hand.
flavorText: "So that was Asako-sama's handwriting, as I suspected."
name: Perceptive Kitsuki

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, spend 1 fate to an unclaimed ring - take 3 actions. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: "To understand the world is to understand the rhythm of the breath."
name: Austere Exemplar

text: Reaction: After you play a Tattoo attachment on a character - ready that character.
flavorText: "The tattoos I give are gifts from Togashi-no-Kami himself. You were meant to wield this power."
name: Togashi Gaijutsu

text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, if an opponent controls more characters than you, choose a character you control - honor that character.
flavorText: A crisis of children, a heretical sect, and armies marching to war. Yet no guidance would come to him from Togashi-ue.
name: Mirumoto Masashige

text: No attachments except Monk or Tattoo. As an additional cost to choose a Tattooed character you control as a target of an event, the opponent playing that event must pay 1 additional fate.
name: Monastery Protector

text: This character cannot be evaded by the covert keyword. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have played 5 or more cards in the conflict, choose a ring - resolve that ring's effects as if you were the attacking player.
name: Togashi Mitsu

text: No attachments except Monk or Tattoo. Action: Detach an attachment from a character you control and turn it into a character. If that card has the printed attachment card type, its [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skills are equal to its printed [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] modifiers and it has 0 glory.
name: Togashi Hoshi

text: You are considered to have played an additional card in each conflict.
flavorText: With simple ritual and meditation, one lets go of the Three Sins: Desire, Fear and Regret.
name: Shintao Monastery

text: Action: During a conflict - increase the cost for each player to play cards by 1 until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: At the sight of black sails, Maeko's heart sank. "I never thought I would be so mad at myself for being right."
name: Asahina Maeko

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - each participating character gets -X[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict, where X is that character's printed [conflict-political] skill.
flavorText: "What good is an army if you don't use it?"
name: Matsu Koso

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an unclaimed ring - switch that ring with a ring in your claimed ring pool and gain all fate on it. (Retain the ring's conflict type.)
flavorText: "Never overlook knowledge when you find it, no matter how lowly its source."
name: Asako Togama

text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel, ignoring the skill modifiers of attachments until the end of the duel. Bow the duel's loser and dishonor the duel's winner.
flavorText: "I see your skill is greater than mine. Please accept my most sincere apology."
name: Bayushi Gensato

text: Action: Choose an attachment an opponent controls with printed cost 1 or less - move it from the character it is on to another character controlled by the same player.
flavorText: "Do you have any idea what spirits you might anger? Do you even have any way of controlling them?"
name: Iuchi Rimei

text: Each character with 1 or more attachments cannot be honored or dishonored.
flavorText: "My father is a liar and a hypocrite. How could I feel any loyalty to a man who  has never once told me the truth?"
name: Ichirō

text: You may play this character as an attachment with the text: "Reaction: After you play a card during a conflict in which attached character is participating - attached character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict. (Unlimited.)"
name: Togashi Acolyte

text: Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait. Attached character cannot be chosen as the target of keywords or abilities triggered from characters with an equal or higher printed cost.
name: Vine Tattoo

text: Action: During a conflict in which attached character is participating, sacrifice this attachment and choose a player - that player puts his or her hand on the bottom of his or her conflict deck in a random order and draws that many cards.
name: An Ocean in a Drop

text: Attach to a [clan-dragon] character. Action: During a conflict in which attached character is participating, return this attachment to your hand - put an attachment from your hand into play attached to the same character. (Max 1 per round.)
name: Niten

text: Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait. Restricted. Reaction: After you play an event that chooses attached character as a target - play that event again (paying all costs). You may choose new targets. Remove that event from the game.
name: Dragon Tattoo

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Monk character you control – until the end of the conflict, that character cannot be bowed or moved home by opponents' card effects. If you have played another Kihō in this conflict, draw 1 card.
name: Iron Foundations Stance

text: Action: During a conflict in which you have played 3 or more cards, choose a participating Monk character you control - each participating character your opponent controls with [conflict-military] skill equal to or lower than the chosen character gets -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
name: Wildfire Kick

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the defender, choose an attachment - discard it.
name: Hida Kotoe

text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.) Reaction: After this attachments enters play, if it is on a character with printed cost 2 or less - ready attached character.
name: Elegant Tessen

text: Restricted. Reaction: After you gain fate from a ring - draw 1 card. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: Even the wisest and most powerful daimyō does not wholly ignore the words of one who has studied the Tao.
name: Four Temples Advisor
